attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ALL)

FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ALL STG_CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ALL,
(
select PROJECT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ALL
minus
select PROJECT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ALL
) ACM
where 
 ACM.PROJECT_ID = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_ID 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
